feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Overall status of sales order (IC -CTAD) showing irrevalent even after applying reason of rejection.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good Day.!

We are unable to keep overall status of sales order as completed after applying reason for rejection for item category CTAD. Once applying reason for rejection sale order overall status has become “Not relevant” instead of” completed”. PFA attached document for reference.

Thanks and regards,

Akash Kadam

entry.title: Item category for a release sales order with reference to a contract with milestone billing plan
entry.content:
Hello Guys

Please help me. Which item category should a release sales order have when referred to a quantitative contract with billing plan , TAO item category.

I have 3 dates in the billing plan, 01.10.2024, 01.11.2024 and 01.12.2024.

I want to use the sales order to deliver and bill the first line, for entire quantity.

Thank you

entry.title: Combine FWSD from TM with a SD order in one invoice
entry.content:
My client, who is an LSP with operations from both TM (FWO) and SD, want to merge both services into a single invoice document.

When I create an FWO, the FWSD settlement document generates the invoice directly in SD, preventing the creation of a consolidated invoice with another document, as can be done in VF04 with multiple SD orders. 

Is there a standard mechanism that allows me to achieve this goal?

entry.title: how to use LT0G
entry.content: what is LT0G transaction meant for ?

entry.title: OBD DATE CAN CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Can we change the OBD date at table level?

entry.title: Complex Customer Hierarchy
entry.content:
Our company is transitioning from three separate CRMs systems to SAP. Currently, we have duplicate customer records across these CRMs because each system is used for different product ranges.

The initial plan is to maintain these duplicate/triplicate customer accounts in SAP, as each account, though representing the same entity, often has different payers, delivery addresses, and assigned sales representatives. However, we're exploring if a more structured approach is possible.

Example of our customer structure: 

We sell products to various schools under the New York City Department of Education through different contracts. In our CRMs, each school isn't treated as a single entity; instead, different departments within the same school are handled as separate entities. 

For example:

  1. The science department of a high school purchases lab equipment and is billed separately.
  2. The athletic department of the same high school also buys from us but is treated as a distinct entity.

Ideally, we'd like to structure our customer hierarchy in SAP as follows:

  1. Parent Account: New York City Department of Education
  2. Child Accounts: Individual Schools
  3. Sub-Child Accounts: Departments within each school (e.g., Science Department, Athletic Department)

Questions are:

  1. Is it possible to create this hierarchical structure in SAP? Who in the example would be created as a business partner? In my eyes the department of education and each school would be Business partners, then each department would be created as a child of each school?
  2. If that's true, can each child and sub-child account have its own:
    • Sales representative
    • Payer
    • Delivery address
    • Other unique attributes

entry.title: SD - Incompletion procedure trigger before entering material
entry.content:
Hello SAPiens ,

Is there any way to trigger SD incompletion procedure in sales document before entering material . 

My scenario is : payment methode (in header accounting tab) needs to be filled before entering material because i have a condition type that depends on the payment methode . I have set incompletion procedure but it only gets triggered after entering material (when i save the document) , so i am obliged to update conditions everytime .

Could you please help me on that . thank you !

entry.title: RVV50R10C user profile customizing vs. Variant
entry.content:
Hi,

we setup RVV50R10C as a job with a Variant. 

In the tab User Role for our Variant we select a User Profile and flag the field "List of blocked documents" as 1 (List contains only blocked orders) to avoid duplicated delivery creation.

However in the CUstomizing of the User Profile the field "List of blocked documents" is marked as BLANK (Construct list without document block).

Now during several Job runs we sitll got duplicated deliveries.

Does the customizing of the User Profile overwrite the Variant when executed as a Job in Background?

SNote https://me.sap.com/notes/1454193/ only gave hint regarding customizing.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Retention GL
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I have a client requirement to create a special GL to hold the customer retention amount for until the retention amount is due for receivable.

Can you please help that how can we create a special GL for customer retention Process.

entry.title: Archiving question
entry.content: I got a question on archiving. If we are archiving application data for SD - SD_VBAK, SD_VBRK etc....and if the data being archived has attachments(external attachments and BRF+ outputs), even if we select "archive attachments" the actual attachment that is stored in DB/Content Server/Filesystem/External storage like Sharepoint/AzureBlob is not actually getting deleted. I mean data is getting archived and data from output is getting convered to RAW data, data is getting deleted from SAP tables and archived to whichever location we set it up as.  Is this normal in SAP that SAP standard archiving doesn't actually delete the attachments/outputs created thus leaving them as zombies because the link information in DMS is deleted so one cannot know which business object this attachment belongs to. Can you throw some light on how you managed this situation. This way all attachments are left as zombies for all the data that is archived and this seems like a big issue. I don't know how else to analyse this further

entry.title: How to manage odd quantities in Packing BoM
entry.content:
We are manufacturing individual unit as Make to Stock and we release production order from SAP for 100 qty to produce. We have design the system to keep the SFG BoM and FG BoM Seperate.

Now the question is, we are storing 31 Units under 1 pallet and if we divide the 1000 then 32.25 pallets are required. Now 32 pallets will have 31 Units and each unit attached with the serial number as well AND 32nd Unit will only have 8 Units.

How we can manage the situation wherein we can track the pallet-wise qty and serial number inside each pallet with the use of standard SAP.

Our packing will be done prior to it goes to the storage unit.

Can anyone assist us with good SAP Practise to manage the same?

entry.title: SD Invoice increase request document type is not there CBII
entry.content:
Dear all ,

I have an issue I can't find document type CBII Invoice increase request (System version 2023) . 

could you please help me on that

entry.title: SD_COND & W_KALK Price Conditions.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm having some trouble figuring out the order of the these archiving objects, as they both seem to archive price conditions, or at least fields from the KONH are they archiving the same price conditions? .

The Customer, inst too happy with how to lookup the price conditions in the info_structures in W_KALK, so as far as I see it, we would need to archive SD_COND first, as it can't find any of the fields which W_KALK have already archived, is this assessment correct? Or am I wrong in my  assumption that they archieve the same pricing conditions.

entry.title: can we create a sales contract using a reference contract but with different sales area?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a sales contract (with sales area having 10 as distribution channel) and now we want to create a warranty contract (with sales area having 20 as distribution channel). Unable to create with reference as the sales area is not same. 

Can someone suggest what should be the copy controls?

Thanks

Praneeth

entry.title: no reference documents appear when create return order in app "Manage Customer Returns "
entry.content:
Hi experts，

When I create return order in PCE following scope item 3TE, in page "Create Returns Order from Reference Document", there are no reference documents in the list and appear even though I cleared all the filters. however, we already created many sales orders and billing documents.  

is there any one can tell me if I miss any configuration for return order in fiori?

entry.title: How sales order will be created if we don't have capacity.
entry.content:
Customer need a product of 1 pc and sales order has been created on todays date for 1 pc. It needs 1 day to produce 1 pc of the same product from production side.

Against the sales order, production order has been created and operation has been dispatched to work centers. For today the capacity is full. No more production can be done.

Now the same customer need the same product of 2 pc by today itself. But we don't have the resource capacity to produce it today. We have resource capacity tomorrow to produce it.

Now how the new quantity will be handled in sales order. Will system propose the tomorrows date?

entry.title: SAP SD
entry.content:
This message sent to me when I do delivery 

No delivery-relevant items in order 0000005528, order type MTOR

Message No. VL455

Diagnosis

The sales order you want to deliver, sales order 0000005528 with order type MTOR, either contains no delivery-relevant items or its delivery-relevant items have already been delivered.

entry.title: Sales BOM: Can we have components in the Sales BOM from different plants?
entry.content:
Sales BOM: Can we have components in the Sales BOM from different plants?

For example: Sales BOM Header from Plant A, and sub-items from Plant B & Plant C.

entry.title: Sales BOM: Is it possible to have Sales BOM that could consist of Product and services?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

Regarding Sales BOM, Is it possible to have Sales BOM that could consist of Product and services in standard SAP? 

Thanks

entry.title: I create sales order and I do delivery when I press post goods issue this message sent to me
